zh.lifeSummary: Robert Beet Marsham是Ralph Marsham和Elizabeth Claxton的兒子，於大約1492年出生在英國諾福爾可。他於1516年與Sarah Elizabeth Downes在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1555年9月在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 梅爾敦享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Beet Marsham是Ralph Marsham和Elizabeth Claxton的儿子，于大约1492年出生在英国諾福爾可。他于1516年与Sarah Elizabeth Downes在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1555年9月在英国英格兰諾福爾可格亞特 梅爾敦享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marsham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Beet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Latin Beatus ‘blessed’, name of the apostle of Switzerland; pronounced as two syllables.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: Robert Beet Marsham was born about 1492, in Norfolk, England as the son of Ralph Marsham and Elizabeth Claxton. He married Sarah Elizabeth Downes in 1516, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died in September 1555, in Great Melton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Beet Marsham est né environ 1492, à Norfolk, Angleterre, fils de Ralph Marsham et Elizabeth Claxton. Il a épousé Sarah Elizabeth Downes en 1516, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1555, à Great Melton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Beet Marsham wurde um 1492 in Norfolk, England, als Sohn von Ralph Marsham und Elizabeth Claxton geboren. Er hat 1516 in Norfolk, England Sarah Elizabeth Downes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb im September 1555 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Great Melton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Beet Marshamは約1492年にイギリスノーフォルクでRalph MarshamとElizabeth Claxtonの息子として生まれた。1516年にイギリスノーフォルクでSarah Elizabeth Downesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1555年9月にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレアト メルトンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Beet Marsham(은)는 대략 1492년 영국 노르폴크에서 Ralph Marsham(와)과 Elizabeth Claxton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1516년 영국 노르폴크에서 Sarah Elizabeth Downes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 멜턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Beet Marsham nasceu aproximadamente 1492, em Norfolk, Inglaterra filho de Ralph Marsham e Elizabeth Claxton. Ele casou-se com Sarah Elizabeth Downes em 1516, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1555, em Great Melton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Beet Marsham родился около 1492 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. Его родителей звали Ralph Marsham и Elizabeth Claxton. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Elizabeth Downes в 1516 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер сентябрь 1555 г. в местности грит мелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
